overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a red coat walking along a mountain trail at night. The character passes an ancient stone monolith and approaches wooden pavilion structures on a hillside under a starry sky, with dramatic mountain scenery in the background.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path beside a rocky cliff face toward a distant stone monolith

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff wall running alongside the left side of the path
winding dirt trail with small rocks and patches of grass
tall green grass and wildflowers lining the right side of the path
tall rectangular stone pillar with a lantern light visible ahead on the path
distant snow-capped mountains visible in the background under the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail hugging a cliff face on the left, with tall grass on the right. Ahead stands a stone monolith with a glowing lantern, while distant mountains loom under a starry night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open hillside with ancient stone monument

events.description: passing the stone monolith and emerging from the cliffside into open terrain

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past the stone pillar as the landscape opens up to reveal distant mountains

entered.detail: tall rock spires visible in the distance to the left across the valley

segments.scene_description: The character passes the stone monolith, leaving the cliffside behind as the terrain opens into a wide hillside. The path continues through tall grass with distant rock formations now visible across the valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding hillside trail with panoramic mountain views

events.description: path curves to the right ascending the hillside with view of distant coastline

agents.ego_description: walking uphill along the winding trail with expansive views of mountains and distant water

segments.scene_description: The character continues ascending the open hillside as the path curves right, offering panoramic views of the mountain range and a glimpse of distant water. The terrain remains grassy with the trail winding upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: hilltop approach with wooden pavilion structures

events.description: wooden pavilion structures and stone ruins come into view on the hilltop ahead

agents.ego_description: walking up the final approach toward the wooden pavilions and ruins on the hilltop

entered.detail: traditional wooden gazebo-like structure with a pointed roof on the hilltop
ancient stone wall ruins adjacent to the wooden structures

segments.scene_description: As the character ascends the final stretch of the hill, traditional wooden pavilion structures and ancient stone ruins come into view on the right, marking the destination at the hilltop under the starry night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that transforms from a narrow cliffside path into an expansive hilltop vista. It begins with the character walking a tight dirt trail between a cliff face and tall grass, moving toward a stone monolith illuminated by a glowing lantern under a starry sky. As the character passes the monolith, the terrain opens into a wide hillside, shifting the perspective from the enclosed cliffside to a broad valley filled with distant rock formations. The scene then expands as the path curves right, revealing panoramic views of the mountain range and distant water while ascending through the grassy slopes. Finally, the climb culminates as traditional wooden pavilions and ancient stone ruins emerge on the right, marking the destination at the summit.
